description: The Item Shelf component, often referred to as the tool shelf, is found on the wrists of avatars and is used to place items or tools onto the user's hands for later retrieval or use. It is sometimes used by creations to keep an item on the user's hand.

fields.GrowDirection: the direction the shelf should grow as the item area grows.
fields.IgnoreGrabber: The grabber that when items are released from it, the items should be ignored by this.
fields.MinLength: The minimum length the shelf visual can be.
fields.Width: The width of the shelf visual.
fields.Thickness: The thickness of the shelf visual.
fields.MaxItemSize: The maximum size before items will not stick to this shelf.
fields.MaxPlaneDistance: The max plane distance items can be before they will not stick to this shelf.
fields.MaxHeightDistance: The max height distance items can be before they will not stick to this shelf.
fields._targetLength: The length this item shelf is tweening towards.
fields._visual: The root of the shelf visual.
fields._content: The slot containing items for this item shelf.
fields._material: The material being used for the item shelf.
fields._visualOffset: The field being used to offset the visual position.
fields._shelfMesh: The mesh being used for the shelf visual.
fields._collider: The collider being used to receive items for this shelf.
